comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Contract written in docs/caducus-biblicus-contract.md. Covers: input mapping (canonical event -> TimestampedText), config boundary (Caducus vs biblicus pass-through), storage ownership (events + checkpoints vs Biblicus analysis/vectors), scope isolation (group_id default source_type:logical_id, one group per analyze run). Analysis story kanbus-f60e13 updated with contract-based Gherkin.
